title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while out and about with Gold City...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so those are the Cuties I've heard so much
about.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City is looking at a claw machine filled with
Umamusume plushies.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Only runners with high promise get to have Cuties
made after them, you know.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: So... Yeah, I'm probably not in there.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I'm not against checking it out, though. I heard
Cuties are pretty high quality for being plushies.
choice_data_list: Then let's get one to see for ourselves.
Then let's get one to see for ourselves.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Why do you have your wallet out? Wait,
don't tell me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
